subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou beholdest Thy servant captive amidst Thy creatures, deprived of Thy presence and the visitation of Thy countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری عبادک اسیرا بین بریتک و محروما عن وجهک و زیاره طلعتک و
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @martyrs and martyrdom
